{"file_path":"/home/runner/.claude/plans/glistening-greeting-snowflake.md","content":"# Plan: Add Fixed-Window Rate Limiting Middleware

## Context

The code review flagged that `src/middleware/rateLimit.ts` and `src/middleware/rateLimit.test.ts` are **missing entirely** — no implementation was committed. The existing `rate-limiter.ts` implements a sliding-window algorithm (`Map<string, number[]>` storing individual timestamps). This task requires a separate fixed-window implementation (`Map<string, {count, windowStart}>`), which resets the entire counter atomically when the time boundary is crossed.
